A_value: hydrostatic, boussinesq approximations; finite-difference discretization; fixed bathymetry
B_value: stoichiometric phytoplankton growth; temperature, light-dependent production rates; multiple plankton functional types
AB_value: dynamic tracer exchange; dms production is influenced by plankton, light; no feedback from atmosphere modeled in this setup
detail: A→AB:0.00 (covered: —) | B→AB:0.21 (covered: light, plankton, production) | A∪B→AB:0.21 (covered: light, plankton, production) | uncovered_AB: atmosphere, dms, dynamic, feedback, influenced, is, modeled, no, setup, this, tracer

A_value: a 3d ocean general circulation model simulating currents, mixing, sea ice, thermohaline structures, surface fluxes, providing the physical environment for biogeochemical modules such as planktom10.; initial, boundary conditions for ocean state variables, optionally, biogeochemical feedback fields from planktom10.; biogeochemical feedbacks influencing physical light climate or fluxes
B_value: a 3d marine biogeochemical model simulating plankton dynamics, nutrient cycles, dimethylsulphide dms production, coupled online with nemo to use its physical state variables.; physical ocean state variables from nemo; physical drivers for biogeochemistry
AB_value: an integrated ocean modeling system combining the nemo physical circulation model with the planktom10 marine biogeochemical model. simulates physical ocean dynamics, dimethylsulphide dms production / emissions using interactive coupling.
